summary: CRITICAL: (1) Unpinned action—workflow line 11 uses `actions/checkout@v4` instead of full commit SHA. (2) Deliverable incomplete: SemanticVersionBumper.Tests.ps1 (referenced line 28) and fixture files (./fixtures/*.txt, *.json) not provided; workflow will fail at runtime. (3) Test logic duplicated inline (lines 38–50) vs Run-ActTests.ps1. (4) Module missing `Set-StrictMode -Version Latest`. Would not run or ship.
